span.p:
Normal operating state.
Publishes telemetry.
Receives commands.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Certificate revoked.
MQTT connection rejected.
Data retained per policy.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Certificate destroyed.
License freed.
Data archived or purged.
